figures.caption: Fig. 2. Convergence properties of d-ISBRAG. The plots share a common legend Different plots correspond to different values of communication time steps Tcon and step-size parameters {αi}i∈A. The figures from the top are arranged as follows. (First) Tcon = 10, αi = 0.01, ∀i ∈ A. (Second) Tcon = 50, αi = 0.01, ∀i ∈ A. (Third) Tcon = 100, αi = 0.01, ∀i ∈ A. (Fourth) Tcon = 100, αi = 0.1, ∀i ∈ A.
Fig. 1. Effect of step-size parameters {αi}i∈A on convergence of ISBRAG. The plots share a common legend. (Top) αi = 0.1, ∀i ∈ A. (Bottom) αi = 0.01, ∀i ∈ A.
